title: Ruhroh Maintenance
description: Maintenance-oriented coding-agent tasks focused on local app repair, operational polish, and durable user workflows.

methodology.retryPolicy: Use the run manifest to distinguish repeatable agent failures from one-off infrastructure failures; otherwise count the run.

changelog: 1.0.0: Initial maintenance suite using the most stateful bundled app tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Scenario must have enough moving parts to expose agent repair and continuation behavior.
Scenario must preserve full implementation journey artifacts for post-failure diagnosis.
Evaluation must classify incomplete delivery separately from infrastructure failure.
governance.contaminationReview: Maintenance suite scenarios should be reviewed for reward-hacking shortcuts before each suiteVersion bump.
governance.rewardHackingReview: Review maintenance tasks for shallow cosmetic fixes, ignored broken workflows, and evaluator checks that fail to distinguish infrastructure failures from incomplete delivery.
reviewChecklist: Confirm each scenario requires diagnosis or repair of a user-visible workflow.
Confirm evaluator evidence separates incomplete implementation from external infrastructure failure.
Confirm preserved journey artifacts expose the attempted repair path for review.
governance.deprecationPolicy: Retain deprecated scenarios in changelog and publish a replacement suiteVersion instead of silently changing membership.
